title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Infosys Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Infosys Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Infosys Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Infosys Advisory Limited:
Infosys Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys Advisory Limited!
